# youtrack Provider

Youtrack base configuration for provider

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "youtrack" {
  base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `base_url` (String) YouTrack instance URL. Can also be set via TF_VAR_YOUTRACK_URL environment variable.

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) YouTrack API token. Can also be set via TF_VAR_YOUTRACK_TOKEN environment variable.
